publishedAbstract: - Issue is with the Monitors and OSDs failing with the following event: ~~~ "MapVolume.WaitForAttach failed for volume \"pvc-xxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-951d-b0b175fbd47c\": WaitForAttach failed for VMDK \"[EXAMPLE] kubevols/openshift-xxxxx-dynamic-pvc-xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-951d-b0b175fbd47c.vmdk\": devicePath is empty ~~~- Mons/osds in the openshift-storage namespace stuck in CLBO / CrashLoopBackOff status
publishedTitle: VMDK OSDs failing with devicePath is empty
